overview.value: Chinese Money Plant has round coin-shaped leaves on slender stems. It stays compact, grows quickly in bright light, and often produces small offsets.

careDifficultyDescription.value: Simple to grow with bright light and careful watering.

light.value: Bright indirect light; rotate often for a balanced shape.

water.value: Water when the top 2-3 cm of soil dries.

humidityDescription.value: Average indoor humidity is usually enough.

diseaseRiskDescription.value: Drooping or cupped leaves can reflect watering stress or low light.

fertilizer.value: Feed monthly in spring and summer.

tips.value: Separate offsets once they have their own small roots.
